title: Database Architects
description: Design strategies for enterprise databases, data warehouse systems, and multidimensional networks. Set standards for database operations, programming, query processes, and security. Model, design, and construct large relational databases or data warehouses. Create and optimize data models for warehouse infrastructure and workflow. Integrate new systems with existing warehouse structure and refine system performance and functionality.

tasks.text: Develop and document database architectures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with system architects, software architects, design analysts, and others to understand business or industry requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop database architectural strategies at the modeling, design and implementation stages to address business or industry requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design databases to support business applications, ensuring system scalability, security, performance, and reliability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop data models for applications, metadata tables, views or related database structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design database applications, such as interfaces, data transfer mechanisms, global temporary tables, data partitions, and function-based indexes to enable efficient access of the generic database structure.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop methods for integrating different products so they work properly together, such as customizing commercial databases to fit specific needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create and enforce database development standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document and communicate database schemas, using accepted notations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop data model describing data elements and their use, following procedures and using pen, template or computer software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work as part of a project team to coordinate database development and determine project scope and limitations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and evaluate industry trends in database systems to serve as a source of information and advice for upper management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up database clusters, backup, or recovery processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate database technical functionality, such as performance, security and reliability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop load-balancing processes to eliminate down time for backup processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and install upgrades of database management system software to enhance database performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify, evaluate and recommend hardware or software technologies to achieve desired database performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test programs or databases, correct errors, and make necessary modifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify and correct deviations from database development standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review project requests describing database user needs to estimate time and cost required to accomplish project.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write and code logical and physical database descriptions, and specify identifiers of database to management system or direct others in coding descriptions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain archived procedures, procedural codes, or queries for applications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical support to junior staff or clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish and calculate optimum values for database parameters, using manuals and calculators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train users and answer questions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
